en: You are getting this form because you said “Yes” to having an Italy Chamber of Commerce Certificate in the Italy Chamber of Commerce Certificate Applicability Assessment
Please submit a copy of your Chamber of Commerce Registration Certificate (Visura Camerale).
The document must be issued within the last 6 months and still valid.
Please enter the issue date of the document.
Please enter a date that is six (6) months from the issue date.\nFor compliance purposes, a Visura Camerale is considered valid for six (6) months from the Issue Date.
Please enter the Validity End date of the document.
